name: strangr
description: Account-based social discovery over text and video.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @strangr/contracts && npm run build --workspace @strangr/config && npm run build --workspace @strangr/database && npm run build --workspace @strangr/ui && npm run build --workspace @strangr/api && npm run build --workspace @strangr/web && npm run build --workspace @strangr/admin && npm run client-secrets:check
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @strangr/contracts && npm run build --workspace @strangr/ui && npm run build --workspace @strangr/web && npm run client-secrets:check
scripts.build:admin: npm run build --workspace @strangr/ui && npm run build --workspace @strangr/admin && npm run client-secrets:check
scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace @strangr/contracts && npm run build --workspace @strangr/config && npm run build --workspace @strangr/database && npm run build --workspace @strangr/api
scripts.lint: eslint scripts tests eslint.config.js playwright.config.ts vitest.integration.config.ts --max-warnings 0 && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test:legacy && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run migrations:check && npm run secrets:check
